name: claude-context-pill
description: Estimated token-usage tracker pinned to the claude.ai composer.
author: 25TH (@25thprmr)

scripts.package: web-ext build --source-dir=. --artifacts-dir=./dist --overwrite-dest --filename=claude-context-pill-{version}.zip --ignore-files=dist node_modules .github preview .git .gitignore CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md PRIVACY.md package.json package-lock.json README.md
scripts.verify: node -e "const m=require('./manifest.json'); const p=require('./package.json'); if(m.version!==p.version){console.error('manifest/package version mismatch:',m.version,'vs',p.version); process.exit(1)} console.log('versions match:',m.version)"
